content.query:
create table opt.mortality_t
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
) as 
select 
  m.Record_ID as record_id
  , m.Input_Token as input_token
  , m.Date_of_Death as date_of_death
  , m.Deceased_State as deceased_state
  , m.Deceased_County as deceased_county
  , case when m.Deceased_County is null then concat(m.Deceased_State, '-XXXXX') else concat(m.Deceased_State, m.Deceased_County) end as deceased_state_county
  , d.fips_state_county as deceased_fips_state_county
  , Deceased_Match_Indicator as deceased_match_indicator
  , Verified_or_Proof_Code as verified_or_proof_code
  , Deceased_Source as deceased_source
  , Confidence_Score as confidence_score
from customer.stg_mortality_t m
  left join dim.map_mortality_county_name_t map
    on m.deceased_state = map.deceased_state and m.deceased_county = map.deceased_county
  left join dim.fips_state_county_code_t d
    on m.deceased_state = d.state and upper(replace(replace(d.county_name, ' County', ''), ' Borough', '')) like concat(upper(coalesce(map.county_name, m.deceased_county)), '%')
where 
  deceased_match_indicator = 'Y'
  and ((len(date_of_death) = 4 and try_cast(date_of_death as integer) between 2023 and 2024)
        or (len(date_of_death) >= 6 and try_cast(substring(date_of_death, 5, 2) as integer) between 1 and 12) and substring(date_of_death, 1, 6) between '202301' and '202405')
;

select count(*)
from opt.mortality_t
where date_of_death is null
group by 1
limit 100;

select substring(a.date_of_death, 1, 6) as month_of_death, sum(1)
  from customer.stg_mortality_t a
where len(date_of_death) >= 6 and substring(date_of_death, 1, 6) between '202301' and '202405'
group by 1
order by 1;

select count(*) from customer.stg_mortality_t m
where date_of_death is null and deceased_match_indicator = 'Y'
limit 10
  deceased_match_indicator = 'N' or deceased_match_indicator is null
limit 10;

select count(*) from opt.mortality_t a
where 
  -- len(date_of_death) < 6
  -- date_of_death < '2000'
  len(date_of_death) < 6 or (len(date_of_death) >= 6 and try_cast(substring(date_of_death, 5, 2) as integer) not between 1 and 12)
limit 10;

select a.date_of_death, sum(1)
  from opt.mortality_t a
where len(date_of_death) < 6
group by 1
order by 1;

select sum(1)
from opt.mortality_t
where substring(deceased_fips_state_county, 1, 2) = '72' 
limit 10;

-- select distinct state, county_name, regexp_replace(county_name, r'( County| Borough)$', ''), fips_state_county
-- from dim.fips_state_county_code_t
-- where state = 'PR' 
-- order by 1, 2
-- upper(county_name) like '%FREDERICKSBURG%'

-- check if any county in mortality data cannot match fips county code after using county name mapping
select a.deceased_state, a.deceased_county, m.county_name, b.fips_state_county, max(date_of_death) as date_of_death
from
(
select distinct deceased_state, deceased_county, date_of_death
from opt.mortality_t
) a 
left join opt.map_mortality_county_name_t m
  on a.deceased_state = m.deceased_state and a.deceased_county = m.deceased_county
left join dim.fips_state_county_code_t b
  on a.deceased_state = b.state and upper(regexp_replace(b.county_name, r'( County| Borough)$', '')) like upper(coalesce(m.county_name, a.deceased_county))||'%'
where b.fips_state_county is null and a.deceased_county is not null
group by a.deceased_state, a.deceased_county, m.county_name, b.fips_state_county
order by 1, 2



-- check if any county from mortality is not in the cdc mortality data
with mortality_monthly_tab as
(
  select a.deceased_state, a.deceased_county, a.deceased_fips_state_county, substring(a.date_of_death, 1, 6) as month_of_death, sum(1) as deaths
  from opt.mortality_t a
  group by a.deceased_state, a.deceased_county, a.deceased_fips_state_county, substring(a.date_of_death, 1, 6)
)
select a.deceased_state--, a.deceased_county, deceased_fips_state_county
, sum(deaths) as deaths
from mortality_monthly_tab a 
left join
(
  select distinct
    county_code
  from dim.mortality_2020_yearly_t
) b
on a.deceased_fips_state_county = b.county_code
where /*a.deceased_fips_state_county is not null and*/ b.county_code is null
group by a.deceased_state--, a.deceased_county, deceased_fips_state_county
order by deaths desc
;


-- split mortality data by age group, gender, race
create table opt.mortality_by_age_group_gender_race_t as
with mortality_monthly_tab as
(
  select a.deceased_state, a.deceased_state_county, a.deceased_fips_state_county, substring(a.date_of_death, 1, 6) as month_of_death, sum(1) as deaths
  from opt.mortality_t a
  where 
    substring(date_of_death, 1, 4) = '2023' and len(date_of_death) >= 6 and cast(substring(date_of_death, 5, 2) as integer) between 1 and 12
  group by a.deceased_state, a.deceased_state_county, a.deceased_fips_state_county, substring(a.date_of_death, 1, 6)
),
county_split_tab as
(
  select 
    county_code, age_group, gender, race, deaths
    , deaths / sum(deaths) over (partition by county_code) as deaths_prop_in_county
  from dim.mortality_rate_t
),
state_split_tab as
(
  select 
    b.state, state_code, age_group, gender, race, deaths
    , deaths / sum(deaths) over (partition by state_code) as deaths_prop_in_state
  from
    (
      select 
        substring(county_code, 1, 2) as state_code, age_group, gender, race, sum(deaths) as deaths
      from dim.mortality_rate_t
      group by
        substring(county_code, 1, 2), age_group, gender, race
    ) a
    left join dim.us_states_t b
      on a.state_code = b.fips_state_code
), 
us_split_tab as 
(
  select 
    age_group, gender, race, deaths
    , deaths / sum(deaths) over (partition by 1) as deaths_prop
  from
    (
      select 
        age_group, gender, race, sum(deaths) as deaths
      from dim.mortality_rate_t
      group by
        age_group, gender, race
    )
)
select 
  a.deceased_state, a.deceased_state_county, a.deceased_fips_state_county, a.month_of_death, a.deaths as county_monthly_deaths
  , coalesce(case when a.deceased_state in ('PR', 'AS', 'VI', 'GU') or a.deceased_state is null then h.deaths_prop 
            when a.deceased_fips_state_county is null or e.county_code is null then g.deaths_prop_in_state 
            else f.deaths_prop_in_county end, 0) as deaths_prop_in_county
  , a.deaths * coalesce(case when a.deceased_state in ('PR', 'AS', 'VI', 'GU') or a.deceased_state is null then h.deaths_prop 
            when a.deceased_fips_state_county is null or e.county_code is null then g.deaths_prop_in_state 
            else f.deaths_prop_in_county end, 0) as deaths
from mortality_monthly_tab a 
cross join dim.age_ranges_t b
cross join (select distinct race from dim.mortality_rate_t) c
cross join (select distinct gender from dim.mortality_rate_t) d
left join
(
  select distinct county_code from dim.mortality_rate_t
) e
  on a.deceased_fips_state_county = e.county_code
left join county_split_tab f
  on a.deceased_fips_state_county = f.county_code and b.age_lvl2 = f.age_group and c.race = f.race and d.gender = f.gender
left join state_split_tab g
  on a.deceased_state = g.state and b.age_lvl2 = g.age_group and c.race = g.race and d.gender = g.gender
left join us_split_tab h
  on b.age_lvl2 = h.age_group and c.race = h.race and d.gender = h.gender
;



select *
from 
(
  select 
    a.deceased_state, a.deceased_state_county, a.deceased_fips_state_county, a.month_of_death, max(county_monthly_deaths) as county_monthly_deaths
    , sum(deaths) as deaths, sum(deaths_prop_in_county) as deaths_prop_in_county
  from opt.mortality_by_age_group_gender_race_t a
  group by a.deceased_state, a.deceased_state_county, a.deceased_fips_state_county, a.month_of_death
  order by 1, 2, 3, 4
)
where abs(deaths - county_monthly_deaths) > 0.000001









create table opt.deceased_w_generalization_t as 
select distinct
  input_token
  , date_of_death
  , substring(date_of_death, 1, 6) || '-' || case when substring(date_of_death, 7, 2) = '00' then 'X' else cast(extract(DAYOFWEEK from cast(date_of_death as date format 'YYYYMMDD')) as string) end as year_month_dow
  , substring(date_of_death, 1, 6) as year_month
  , substring(date_of_death, 1, 4) as year
  , deceased_state_county
  , deceased_state
  -- , case when count(*) over (partition by date_of_death, deceased_state_county, deceased_state) < 3 then 'Y' else 'N' end as at_risk
  , 'N' as at_risk
from opt.deceased_t 
;

-- select * from opt.deceased_w_generalization_t limit 10;

-- select count(*), count(distinct input_token) from opt.deceased_w_generalization_t;

-- select Deceased_County, count(distinct Deceased_State) from customer.stg_deceased_t
-- group by Deceased_County
-- having count(distinct Deceased_State) > 1;

-- select Deceased_County, count(distinct Deceased_State) from opt.cdc_deceased_by_county_dow_generalization_t
-- group by Deceased_County
-- having count(distinct Deceased_State) > 1;


-- select count(distinct dp_input_token) from opt.deceased_w_generalization_t;

-- select distinct Deceased_County from customer.stg_deceased_t 
-- where Deceased_State = 'LA'
-- order by 1


-- claim dimension table for generalization levels 
create table opt.deceased_feature_generalization_t as
-- generalization for time
select 'time' as feature, null as column_name, null as join_column_name, null as ref_column_name, 0 as level, null as mask, null as generalization_included_in_source
union all
select 'time' as feature, 'year' as column_name, 'year' as join_column_name, 'year' as ref_column_name, 1 as level
  , null as mask, null as generalization_included_in_source
union all
select 'time' as feature, 'year_month' as column_name, 'year_month' as join_column_name, 'year_month' as ref_column_name, 2 as level
  , null as mask, null as generalization_included_in_source
union all
select 'time' as feature, 'year_month_dow' as column_name, 'year_month_dow' as join_column_name, 'year_month_dow' as ref_column_name, 3 as level
  , null as mask, null as generalization_included_in_source
union all
select 'time' as feature, 'date_of_death' as column_name, 'year_month_dow' as join_column_name, 'year_month_dow' as ref_column_name, 4 as level
  , null as mask, null as generalization_included_in_source
-- generalization for location
union all
select 'location' as feature, null as column_name, null as join_column_name, null as ref_column_name, 0 as level, null as mask, null as generalization_included_in_source
union all
select 'location' as feature, 'deceased_state' as column_name, 'deceased_state' as join_column_name, 'deceased_state' as ref_column_name, 1 as level
  , null as mask, 'Y' as generalization_included_in_source
union all
select 'location' as feature, 'deceased_state_county' as column_name, 'deceased_state_county' as join_column_name, 'deceased_state_county' as ref_column_name, 2 as level
  , null as mask, null as generalization_included_in_source
order by 1, 5
;

-- select * from opt.deceased_generalization_w_loss_t order by 1, 5;


-- Add generalization levels to the census data
create table dim.cdc_deceased_by_county_dow_generalization_t as 
with trans as 
(
  select 
    Case when county = 'District of Columbia, DC' then 'DC' else SPLIT(county, ', ')[OFFSET(1)] end || '-' || 
    Case when county = 'District of Columbia, DC' then 'D.C' 
    else upper(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(SPLIT(county, ', ')[OFFSET(0)], ' County', ''), ' Parish', ''), ' Borough', ''), ' city', ''), ' the', '')) 
    end as deceased_state_county
    , Case when county = 'District of Columbia, DC' then 'DC' else SPLIT(county, ', ')[OFFSET(1)] end as deceased_state
    , replace(a.month_code, '/', '') || '-' || weekday_code as year_month_dow
    , replace(a.month_code, '/', '') as year_month
    , substring(a.month_code, 1, 4) as year
    , deaths_population_crude_rate as population
  from dim.cdc_decease_by_county_year_month_weekday_t a 
),
net as 
(
  select 
    case when deceased_state_county = 'AK-FAIRBANKS NORTH STAR' then 'AK-FAIRBANKS N. STAR'
      when deceased_state_county = 'IN-DE KALB' then 'IN-DEKALB'
      when deceased_state_county = 'IN-LA PORTE' then 'IN-LAPORTE'
      when deceased_state_county = 'PA-MC KEAN' then 'PA-MCKEAN'
      when deceased_state_county = 'VA-FREDERICKSBURG' then 'VA-FREDERICKSBURG CTY'
      else deceased_state_county
    end deceased_state_county, deceased_state, year_month_dow, year_month, year, population
  from trans
)
select 
  deceased_state_county
  , deceased_state
  , year_month_dow
  , year_month
  , year
  , population
  , 1 as data_grp
from net 
union all
select 
  deceased_state || '-XXXXX' as deceased_state_county
  , deceased_state
  , year_month_dow
  , year_month
  , year
  , sum(population) as population
  , 2 as data_grp
from net 
group by
  deceased_state
  , year_month_dow
  , year_month
  , year
union all
select 
  deceased_state_county
  , deceased_state
  , year_month || '-' || 'X' as year_month_dow
  , year_month
  , year
  , sum(population) as population
  , 3 as data_grp
from net 
group by
  deceased_state_county
  , deceased_state
  , year_month
  , year
union all
select 
  deceased_state || '-XXXXX' as deceased_state_county
  , deceased_state
  , year_month || '-' || 'X' as year_month_dow
  , year_month
  , year
  , sum(population) as population
  , 4 as data_grp
from net 
group by
  deceased_state
  , year_month
  , year
;


-- select * from opt.deceased_suppression_grid_t;

-- select 
--   coalesce(substring(a.deceased_state_county, 1, 2), substring(b.deceased_state_county, 1, 2)) as state, a.deceased_state_county as LN_county, b.deceased_state_county as CDC_county
-- from

--   full outer join

-- -- where 
-- --   not (a.deceased_state_county is not null and b.deceased_state_county is not null)
-- order by 1, 2, 3;
